businessRule.playerRatingAgeGroupSource: ageGroupOverride if present, else March 31 age bracket, else current documented missing-birthDate fallback to U19
businessRule.proposedRatingMath: average existing GamePerformanceScore.finalPerformanceScore values; adjustedRating equals observedRating; Formula v1 star bands unchanged

risks: Players without birthDate are resolved to U19 by documented fallback; this may keep some younger players in U19 until bio data or ageGroupOverride is added.
Snapshot row counts will change because play-up ratings move from league age groups into player age brackets.
Public rank movement may be large after recomputing snapshots because U16 players with U19 scores gain additional verified games.
Retiring wrong-age PlayerRating and RankingSnapshot rows must be approved and run transactionally.
rollbackPlan: Before repair, export PlayerRating, RankingSnapshot, and RankingSnapshotRow rows for Formula v1.
Run repair in one transaction or in staged transactions with validation gates.
If validation fails, restore exported PlayerRating and RankingSnapshot data or roll back the transaction.
Do not touch GamePerformanceScore, GameStat, Game, Player, Team, League, or Season rows.
recommendedRepairOrder: Implement central player rating bracket resolver.
Dry-run compare proposed ratings against current PlayerRating rows.
With approval, recompute PlayerRating rows by resolved player bracket from existing GamePerformanceScores.
Replace Formula v1 monthly RankingSnapshots from repaired PlayerRatings.
Validate no player with a resolved U16 bracket appears in U19 snapshots unless ageGroupOverride says U19.
